documents.title: About — GENELLA Visuals | Photography & Brand Storytelling
documents.description: GENELLA Visuals — photography, videography, branding and digital media based in Dar es Salaam. We create premium visual content and strategic digital campaigns.
headings: We Capture Moments. We Build Brands.
documents.text: ds. GENELLA Visuals is a Dar es Salaam–based creative studio specializing in photography, videography and digital media. We blend cinematic craft with strategic branding to create visual stories that deepen audience connection and drive measurable results. Professionalism Certified processes and high-end equipment ensure consistent, reliable delivery for weddings, corporate shoots and marketing campaigns. Tailored Creative Strategy Every project begins with discovery to align visuals with your brand goals, audience and platform strategy. Flexible Execution We work on-location, on-schedule and adapt to event timelines and campaign windows to meet tight deadlines without sacrificing quality.

documents.description: Portfolio — Color of Natural: a lifestyle and natural light series by GENELLA Visuals showcasing environmental portraiture and landscape work.
documents.text: Portfolio — Color of Natural | GENELLA Visuals. Recent photography. SPRING GARDEN. Instagram. Quick links. Subscribe. Portfolio — Color of Natural | GENELLA Visuals Home About Services Pricing Portfolio Contact Home Portfolio Color of natural Color of natural Natural Aniaml Lifestyle “Color of Natural” is a commissioned lifestyle series that explores outdoor portraiture and environmental details across coastal and urban locations. GENELLA Visuals focused on natural light, subtle color grading and authentic moments to create a cohesive visual narrative for the client’s seasonal campaign.

documents.title: Portfolio — Color of Natural | GENELLA Visuals
documents.description: Portfolio — Color of Natural: a lifestyle and natural light series by GENELLA Visuals showcasing environmental portraiture and landscape work.
documents.text: ht, subtle color grading and authentic moments to create a cohesive visual narrative for the client’s seasonal campaign. The project combined editorial direction with candid shooting to produce a library of images suitable for social, print and promotional campaigns. Approach: We prioritized location scouting and natural light windows to capture atmospheric images with minimal artificial light. Careful composition and selective retouching preserved texture and color for use across the client’s website and seasonal print materials. Outcome: The client received an editorial portfolio of images and a branded gallery that increased social engagement and supported their PR campaign. Project highlights & approach Client: Seasonal campaign for a lifestyle brand.

documents.title: Portfolio — Color of Natural | GENELLA Visuals
documents.description: Portfolio — Color of Natural: a lifestyle and natural light series by GENELLA Visuals showcasing environmental portraiture and landscape work.
documents.text: gagement and supported their PR campaign. Project highlights & approach Client: Seasonal campaign for a lifestyle brand. Role: Creative direction, photography and post-production. Deliverables: web-ready images, print-ready files and an online gallery for stakeholders. Tech & process: Multi-location shoots, natural-light techniques, selective grading and batch retouching to maintain consistency across the series. Delivery: Final images were supplied in high-resolution TIFFs for print and optimized JPEGs for web, plus a curated gallery link for client sharing. Recent photography SPRING GARDEN Lifestyle SPRING GARDEN Fashion SPRING GARDEN Natural SPRING GARDEN Animal View all photography GENELLA Visuals produces portfolio work and client commissions across commercial, editorial and event categories.

documents.title: Photography & Videography Packages | GENELLA Visuals Pricing
documents.description: Explore GENELLA Visuals photography and videography packages in Tanzania for weddings, engagements, send-offs, kitchen parties, outdoor photoshoots, branding and events.
documents.text: ies depend on package scope. We confirm the exact delivery timeline during booking. Do you travel outside the city? Yes. GENELLA Visuals can travel for weddings, events and destination shoots. Travel and accommodation costs are quoted based on location. Can I customize a package? Yes. You can add coverage hours, extra locations, drone coverage, same-day edits, additional frames or a custom content plan. Is drone coverage available? Yes. Drone coverage is included in the Diamond Package and available as an add-on for other wedding packages where location rules allow it. How do I secure a booking? Choose a package, tap Book Now, send your event details on WhatsApp, and our team will confirm availability plus the deposit process. Do you provide same-day edits? Yes.

documents.title: Services — GENELLA Visuals | Photography · Video · Branding
documents.description: GENELLA Visuals services — professional photography, cinematic videography, branding and digital marketing based in Dar es Salaam.
documents.text: nd lifestyle. We deliver high-resolution images, professional retouching and gallery assets optimized for web and print. Cinematic Videography Creative films, highlight reels and documentary-style videos designed to tell your story with cinematic production values—drone, gimbal and multi-camera support. Post-Production & Editing Color grading, professional editing, audio mixing and branded motion graphics that transform raw footage into polished, on-brand content for campaigns and events. 01 Filming & Production End-to-end production for corporate films, commercials and event coverage—scripting, shooting and full post-production. 02 Engagement & Wedding Photography Story-driven wedding photography and pre-wedding shoots with flexible packages and premium album and display options.
